# truenas_pool (Data Source)

Provides information about a ZFS pool on TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_pool" "tank" {
  name = "tank"
}

output "pool_status" {
  value = data.truenas_pool.tank.status
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (Number) The pool ID to look up.
- `name` (String) The pool name to look up. Either id or name must be specified.

### Read-Only

- `guid` (String) The pool GUID.
- `healthy` (Boolean) Whether the pool is healthy.
- `is_decrypted` (Boolean) Whether the pool is decrypted.
- `path` (String) The pool mount path.
- `status` (String) The pool status (ONLINE, DEGRADED, FAULTED, etc.).
